prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MONSTERATV-RED Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Monster Trucks Red ATV Off Road Friction Toys Trailer Pull Back Cars Description: Backcountry trail races, emergency rescue missions, and epic off-road adventurers, little monster truck fanatics will be swooning over this awesome 3pc monster truck playset from Kidplokio. The off-road, rock crawler monster truck toys feature a cool and rugged outdoor monster truck toys theme, pull-back friction power, and come with x1 monster truck, x1 removable trailer, and x1 ATV. Available in blue, red, or green colorways.

The monster truck toys with ATV come ready to rock right out of the box. Kids can begin playing immediately, with no batteries or complicated assembly required, and no small pieces or instructions to keep track of. By simply pulling back on the monster trucks to create tension, kids and toddlers can watch their cars zoom speedily across the room, with or without the trailer and ATV.

And, not only will little aspiring monster truck drivers be thrilled and occupied for hours, they’ll be engaging in crucial early educational activities like working on their gross and fine motor skills, as well as increasing cognitive development through imaginative pretend play. Search Terms: monster truck toys brother christmas birthday gifts toddler kids stocking stuffers friction power cars preschool learning activities outdoor games car accessories boys kids toy trucks toy trucks for boys ages 3 and up boys toys for play time Features: - 3PC MONSTER TRUCK TOYS - This awesome 3pc monster trucks playset from Kidplokio features a cool outdoor monster truck theme, pull-back friction power and includes x1 monster truck, x1 removable trailer, and x1 ATV for all your little one’s epic off-road adventures! - FRICTION POWERED - These monster truck toys come ready to rock right out of the box; kids can begin playing immediately by pulling back on the truck creating tension, and then watching the toy zoom away with or without the trailer and ATV! - PRETEND PLAY - Not only will little aspiring monster truck drivers be occupied for hours, but they’ll also be engaging in crucial early educational activities like working on their gross and fine motor skills, as well as growing cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions - NO BATTERIES OR ASSEMBLY - No complicated assembly or batteries are required to operate these monster truck toys, meaning playtime can begin right away and there are no small pieces to keep track of - SPECIFICATIONS - Box dimensions: 17” x 5.5” x 5”; Weight: .90lbs; Colors: Assorted; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts, recommended ages 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Red Monster Truck ATV 3-Piece Friction Toy Set
